title: Module 1 — Getting Started
goal: Write and run your first programs; store and show data.

lessons.title: Variables: Giving Data a Name
lessons.concept: A variable is a named box that holds a value you can reuse. Assignment with =, naming rules.

challenge.prompt: Create a variable called city holding the text Paris, then print: I love Paris

lessons.title: Numbers and Math
lessons.concept: Integers and decimals; + - * / and the // and % operators.

challenge.prompt: Print the result of 7 multiplied by 6.

lessons.title: Strings: Working with Text
lessons.concept: Joining text, f-strings, and that text lives in quotes.

challenge.prompt: Set name = 'Ada', then print: Hello, Ada!

lessons.title: Comments and Fixing Your First Errors
lessons.concept: Writing comments with #, and reading a Python error to fix a typo.

challenge.prompt: The starter code has a typo. Fix it so the program prints: fixed
